title: Smoky Crunchy Russian Palm_Sugar Stir_fry
description: A comforting dish featuring palm sugar with a smoky flavor and crunchy texture, perfect for breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: tomato paste
ingredients.notes: can use a bit more if desired

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: regular or low sodium, to taste

ingredients.name: egg whites
ingredients.notes: lightly beaten, optional for binding and texture

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add palm sugar to the skillet and stir until it melts and starts bubbling.
Add minced garlic and ginger. Stir well for about 30 seconds, allowing them to release their flavors.
Pour in tomato paste, soy sauce, and rice vinegar. Mix well and let it simmer until slightly thickened.
If using ground meat or chicken breast, add to the skillet and stir-fry until fully cooked through.
Add beaten egg whites if desired, gently folding them into the mixture for texture.
For a smoky flavor, you can lightly brush oil-coated hands over some fresh mushrooms (optional), then press onto the skillet. Stir well as they cook.
Serve hot and enjoy with steamed rice or noodles.
